working_on.notes: Layout engine post-process now uses subtree-width-aware min gaps to prevent overlap while still distributing siblings as evenly as possible

pending_tasks.task: Verify layout with all generations expanded
pending_tasks.notes: User saw overlap when many generations visible - need to confirm fix works across all levels

pending_tasks.task: Test with resized cards + even distribution
pending_tasks.notes: Custom card sizes affect subtree widths - verify no overlap when cards are enlarged

recent_changes.description: Generation-specific colors matching traditional Vietnamese gia pha
Resizable cards with drag handle, localStorage persistence, Reset button
Layout engine uses getW/getH helpers for custom card dimensions
Removed 'Doi X' generation badge from inside cards
Post-process: re-center parents over children midpoint (bottom-up). shiftSubtree recursive helper
Even distribution of siblings with subtree width constraints
Fixed overlap: even redistribution now respects minimum gap = subtreeWidth_left/2 + SIBLING_GAP + subtreeWidth_right/2. Extra space distributed evenly across all gaps.

errors_encountered.error: Even redistribution caused card overlap - naive even spacing ignored subtree widths
errors_encountered.solution: Compute minimum center-to-center gap for each adjacent pair based on subtree widths. Only distribute EXTRA space (beyond minimums) evenly.
Sort by generation DESC (bottom-up) before post-processing

decisions_made.decision: Use post-processing pass (not modify core algorithm) for centering and redistribution
decisions_made.reason: Core algorithm handles space allocation. Post-process adjusts visual positions.
Children must be in final positions before parent re-centers.
Prevents overlap while allowing even distribution of any extra space.
User requested cleaner cards. Info visible in sidebar labels.

decisions_made.decision: Card sizes persist to localStorage key 'tree-card-sizes'
decisions_made.reason: User resizes cards, should survive reloads. Reset button to clear.
